cases.name: lifecycle_upsert_delete
cases.expected: created, published, and archived source states replace the tenant-local Blog search document; delete removes it

cases.name: projected_payload
cases.expected: slug, author, tags, channels, publication timestamps, counts, and version are projected from Blog-owned tables

cases.name: full_blog_reindex
cases.expected: stale current-tenant Blog documents are replaced from source rows while another tenant remains unchanged

cases.name: schema_search_path
cases.expected: Blog source-table availability and unqualified projector SQL resolve through the same active PostgreSQL search_path

cases.name: event_routing
cases.expected: all Blog lifecycle events and targeted/full Blog reindex requests are claimed; unrelated reindex targets are ignored

runtime_promotion_requirements: execute both test targets against PostgreSQL
retain migration and pg_trgm permission evidence
exercise targeted reindex with an existing and a missing post
exercise module-disabled cleanup through host lifecycle composition
retain query visibility evidence for published_only storefront search
